failure_reason: Added explicit BML protocol(...) and capability(...) primary grammar hooks plus source-row constructors/parsers/accessors in bml-source.fk. The admitted proof validates grammar hooks as data, protocol/capability source rows, and compatibility witness four-way at 65535. The composite channel-protocol-choice floor now includes this row and passes four-way at 131071. An initial proof that executed a full g-parse method body exposed fkwu missing those parse bits, so the floor was narrowed to the portable source-row proof while leaving full cursor parse covered by existing BML grammar bands.
